title: Ultra Multiverse
description: Ultra-Multiverse is a lightweight minimalistic plugin solution designed specifically for creating and managing Minecraft worlds with unparalleled efficiency.
body:
Ultra Multiverse:

COMMANDS:
===================================================

/umv create [WORLD] -e [ENVIORMENT] -t [TYPE]

/umv delete [WORLD]

/umv load [WORLD]

/umv unload [WORLD]

/umv set [WORLD] [FLAG]

/umv setspawn [WORLD]

/umv tp [WORLD]

/umv flags

/umv list

/umv reload

AVAILABLE FLAGS:
==================================================
-s [seed] - Set the world seed.

-b [true/false] - Enable or disable structures.

-e [environment] - Set the environment (normal, nether, the_end).

-t [type] - Set the world type (flat, amplified, etc.).

-d [difficulty] - Set the difficulty (peaceful, easy, normal, hard).

-p [true/false] - Enable or disable PvP.

FEATURES:
=================================================

- logs each world and its world properties inside worlds.yml

- has a firstworldspawn: #world_name option to set a a world for when a new player joins the server

- has /umv setspawn [WORLD] to set the main spawn per world
  
- has most of the containing gamerule flags such as:
seed, enviorment world type, type-world being:
normal, flat, etc.  Also features, difficulty levels, 
and pvp which can be set to true or false
